testcase.name: Positive TC_01 - To validate busname, boarding point and dropping point in Payment page - #1.1

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element found by By.xpath: //button[contains(@aria-label, 'YBM Travels(BLM)')] (tried for 25 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 11344, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55704}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.83 (2db6d3cb8b2d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Krithika\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55704/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cdc4e26c8cad54dda6289bd3c0695bb9

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element found by By.xpath: //button[contains(@aria-label, 'YBM Travels(BLM)')] (tried for 25 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 11344, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55704}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.83 (2db6d3cb8b2d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Krithika\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55704/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cdc4e26c8cad54dda6289bd3c0695bb9 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:233) at com.pages.SearchPage.viewSeatsButton(SearchPage.java:65) at com.stepdefinition.CommonSteps.user_selects_a_bus_using_view_seats_button(CommonSteps.java:182) at ✽.User selects a bus using view seats button(file:///D:/eclipse-workspace/RedBus/src/test/resources/Features/PositiveTests.feature:21)
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on RedBus website.........................................passed When User enters source city and click in the dropdown option...............passed And User enters destination city and click in the dropdown option...........passed And User clicks date option and selects the journey date....................passed And User toggles Booking for women toggle and closes the pop up.............passed Then User clicks - search button............................................passed When User clicks - multiple filters like Primo Bus, Single Seats and AC.....passed And User clicks - Free Cancellation banner filter...........................passed And User selects a bus using view seats button..............................failed And User selects an available seat..........................................skipped And User clicks - Select boarding & dropping point button...................skipped And User selects boarding point and click Fill passenger details button.....skipped And User enters contact details like Phone number, Email ID and State of Residence.skipped And User enters passenger details like Name "Preshika", Age "21" and Gender "Female".skipped And User clicks - Dont add Free Cancellation checkbox.......................skipped And User clicks - Dont add Redbus Assurance checkbox........................skipped And User clicks - Continue booking button...................................skipped Then User is navigated to the Payment page..................................skipped Then The selected bus name, boarding and dropping points must be displayed correctly on the Payment page.skipped
